en.extract:
The rufous-capped lark (Calandrella eremica) is a small passerine bird of the lark family found in southwestern Arabia and the Horn of Africa.
It was considered to be a subspecies of Blanford's lark.

The '''rufous-capped lark''' ('''''Calandrella eremica''''') is a small [[passerine]] [[bird]] of the [[lark]] family found in southwestern [[Arabian Peninsula|Arabia]] and the [[Horn of Africa]].

It was considered to be a subspecies of [[Blanford's lark]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://avibase.bsc-eoc.org/species.jsp?lang=EN&avibaseid=FE025DB1&sec=summary&ssver=1|title=Calandrella erlangeri - Avibase|website=avibase.bsc-eoc.org|access-date=2016-12-12}}</ref>
